description.fr: Un cours fondamental pour comprendre les outils numériques, la cybersécurité de base, l'éthique en ligne et les opportunités numériques en Afrique.
description.en: A foundational course to understand digital tools, basic cybersecurity, online ethics, and digital opportunities in Africa.

title.fr: Entrepreneuriat en Afrique : Créer et Lancer son Projet

description.fr: Découvrez les fondements de l’entrepreneuriat, les spécificités du marché africain et les stratégies concrètes pour lancer une entreprise locale ou numérique.
description.en: Learn the basics of entrepreneurship, African market realities, and practical strategies to launch a local or digital business.

title.fr: Éthique de l'Intelligence Artificielle en Afrique

description.en: A critical exploration of ethical issues in AI in African societies: algorithmic bias, digital sovereignty, and local data concerns.

title.fr: Changement Climatique et Résilience en Afrique

title.fr: Apprendre à Coder pour la Jeunesse Africaine

description.fr: Une initiation ludique et pratique à la programmation, pensée pour les jeunes africains (15–25 ans), sans prérequis technique.
description.en: A fun and practical introduction to coding, designed for African youth (ages 15–25) with no technical background required.

title.fr: Reverse Mentoring : Innover par l’échange intergénérationnel
title.en: Reverse Mentoring: Innovating through Intergenerational Exchange

description.fr: Découvrez comment le reverse mentoring favorise l’innovation, l’inclusion numérique et la transmission de compétences entre jeunes et seniors dans les organisations africaines. Ce cours explore les bonnes pratiques, les bénéfices et les défis du mentorat inversé, avec des études de cas et des outils pour le mettre en place.
description.en: Learn how reverse mentoring fosters innovation, digital inclusion, and skills transfer between youth and seniors in African organizations. This course covers best practices, benefits, challenges, case studies, and practical tools to implement reverse mentoring.

description.fr: Explorer les innovations médicales, technologiques et sociales pour améliorer la santé sur le continent africain.

description.ha: Bincika tushen AI da amfani da shi a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari ipilẹ AI ati awọn lilo rẹ ni gbogbo agbaye.
description.am: የAI መሠረቶችን እና በዓለም አቀፍ መተግበሪያዎቹን ያስሱ።
description.zu: Hlola izisekelo ze-AI nokusetshenziswa kwayo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha isi AI na ojiji ya n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e AI e aduna.

description.fr: Maîtrisez les stratégies et outils du marketing international pour réussir sur les marchés mondiaux.
description.en: Master strategies and tools of international marketing to succeed in global markets.
description.ar: إتقان استراتيجيات وأدوات التسويق الدولي للنجاح في الأسواق العالمية.
description.sw: Bobea katika mikakati na zana za masoko ya kimataifa kufanikiwa katika masoko ya dunia.
description.ha: Kware da dabarun da kayan aikin tallan duniya don cin nasara a kasuwannin duniya.
description.yo: Mọ awọn ilana ati irinṣẹ titaja kariaye lati ṣaṣeyọri ni awọn ọja agbaye.
description.am: የአለም ማርኬቲንግ ስልቶችን እና መሣሪያዎችን ይማሩ እና በዓለም ገበያዎች ውስጥ ይሳካሉ።
description.zu: Funda amasu namathuluzi okukhangisa emhlabeni wonke ukuze uphumelele ezimakethe zomhlaba.
description.ig: Mụta usoro na ngwá ọrụ ahịa mba ụwa iji mee nke ọma n’ahịa ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e marketing international e waawde gese.

title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Ilimin Halittu na Kwayoyin Halitta

description.fr: Découvrez les bases de la biologie moléculaire et ses applications dans la recherche et la santé à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Discover the basics of molecular biology and its applications in research and health worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف أساسيات علم الأحياء الجزيئي وتطبيقاته في البحث والصحة على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze misingi ya baiolojia ya molekuli na matumizi yake katika utafiti na afya duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi tushen ilimin halittu na kwayoyin halitta da amfani da shi a bincike da lafiya a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ ipilẹ bioloji moleku ati awọn lilo rẹ ninu iwadi ati ilera ni kariaye.
description.am: የሞሌኩላር ባዮሎጂ መሠረቶችን እና በምርምር እና ጤና ውስጥ መተግበሪያዎቹን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Funda izisekelo ze-biology yamangqamuzana nokusetshenziswa kwayo ocwaningweni nasezempilo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta isi biology molekul na ojiji ya n’ime nyocha na ahú ike n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e biologie moléculaire e aduna.

title.fr: Gestion des ressources humaines à l’international
title.sw: Usimamizi wa Rasilimali Watu wa Kimataifa

description.fr: Apprenez à gérer les ressources humaines dans des organisations internationales et multiculturelles.
description.en: Learn to manage human resources in international and multicultural organizations.
description.ar: تعلم إدارة الموارد البشرية في المنظمات الدولية ومتعددة الثقافات.
description.sw: Jifunze kusimamia rasilimali watu katika mashirika ya kimataifa na ya tamaduni nyingi.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake gudanar da ma'aikata a kungiyoyin duniya da na al'adu daban-daban.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ isakoso eda eniyan ni awọn ajo kariaye ati ti ọpọlọpọ aṣa.
description.am: የሰው ኃይልን በዓለም አቀፍ እና በባህላዊ ድርጅቶች ውስጥ ማስተዳደር ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuphatha abasebenzi ezinhlanganweni zomhlaba wonke nezamasiko amaningi.
description.ig: Mụta njikwa mmadụ n’ọrụ n’ụlọ ọrụ mba ụwa na nke ọtụtụ omenala.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e RH international e waawde gese.

description.fr: Apprenez les bases de la programmation Python, un langage utilisé dans le monde entier pour l’analyse de données, l’IA et le développement web.
description.en: Learn the basics of Python programming, a language used worldwide for data analysis, AI, and web development.
description.ar: تعلم أساسيات برمجة بايثون، لغة مستخدمة عالميًا لتحليل البيانات والذكاء الاصطناعي وتطوير الويب.
description.sw: Jifunze misingi ya uprogramu wa Python, lugha inayotumika duniani kote kwa uchambuzi wa data, AI na maendeleo ya wavuti.
description.ha: Koyi tushen shirye-shiryen Python, harshe da ake amfani da shi a duniya don nazarin bayanai, AI da ci gaban yanar gizo.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ ipilẹ eto Python, ede ti a nlo ni kariaye fun itupalẹ data, AI ati idagbasoke wẹẹbu.
description.am: የፓይቶን ፕሮግራሚንግ መሠረቶችን ይማሩ፣ በዓለም አቀፍ የሚጠቀሙበት ቋንቋ ለውሂብ ትንተና፣ AI እና የድህረ ገጽ ልማት።
description.zu: Funda izisekelo zokuhlela iPython, ulimi olusetshenziswa emhlabeni wonke ekuhlaziyeni idatha, AI nasekuthuthukisweni kwewebhu.
description.ig: Mụta isi mmemme Python, asụsụ eji eme ihe n’uwa niile maka nyocha data, AI na mmepe web.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e programmation Python e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de l’innovation

description.fr: Découvrez les principes de la gestion de l’innovation dans les entreprises et organisations à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Discover the principles of innovation management in companies and organizations worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف مبادئ إدارة الابتكار في الشركات والمنظمات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Gundua misingi ya usimamizi wa ubunifu katika kampuni na mashirika duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi ka'idojin gudanar da kirkira a kamfanoni da kungiyoyi a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ awọn ilana isakoso imotuntun ni awọn ile-iṣẹ ati awọn ajo ni kariaye.
description.am: የአዳዲስነት አስተዳደር መሠረቶችን በዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅቶች ውስጥ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Funda izimiso zokuphatha ukuqamba okusha ezinkampanini nasezinhlanganweni emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta ụkpụrụ njikwa mmepe ọhụụ n’ụlọ ọrụ na òtù n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e innovation management e aduna.

description.fr: Comprendre les principes d’éthique et de déontologie applicables à toutes les professions à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Understand the principles of ethics and deontology applicable to all professions worldwide.
description.ar: فهم مبادئ الأخلاقيات وأخلاقيات المهنة القابلة للتطبيق على جميع المهن على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Elewa misingi ya maadili na deontology inayotumika kwa taaluma zote duniani.
description.ha: Fahimci ka'idojin hali da ka'idojin sana'a da ake amfani da su a dukkan sana'o'i a duniya.
description.yo: Loye awọn ilana iwa ati ofin ise to wulo fun gbogbo iṣẹ ni agbaye.
description.am: የሙያ ሥነ ምግባር እና ደንቦችን በዓለም አቀፍ ሁኔታ ያስተውሉ።
description.zu: Qonda izimiso zokuziphatha nemithetho esebenza kuwo wonke amakhono emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Ghọta ụkpụrụ omume na iwu ọrụ bara uru n’ụwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e ethique professionnelle e aduna.

description.fr: Explorez les interactions chimiques dans l’environnement et leurs impacts à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Explore chemical interactions in the environment and their global impacts.
description.ar: استكشاف التفاعلات الكيميائية في البيئة وتأثيراتها على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Gundua mwingiliano wa kemikali katika mazingira na athari zake duniani.
description.ha: Bincika mu'amalar sinadarai a muhalli da tasirinta a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ifesi kemikali ninu ayika ati ipa wọn ni agbaye.
description.am: የኬሚካል ተግባራትን በአካባቢ ውስጥ እና በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያስሱ።
description.zu: Hlola ukusebenzisana kwamakhemikhali emvelweni nomthelela wawo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha mmekọrịta kemikal n’ime gburugburu ebe obibi na mmetụta ya n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e chimie environnementale e aduna.

description.fr: Développez vos compétences pour communiquer efficacement dans des contextes multiculturels à l’international.
description.en: Develop your skills to communicate effectively in multicultural contexts worldwide.
description.ar: طور مهاراتك للتواصل بفعالية في سياقات متعددة الثقافات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Boresha ujuzi wako wa kuwasiliana kwa ufanisi katika mazingira ya tamaduni nyingi duniani.
description.ha: Inganta kwarewarka don sadarwa yadda ya kamata a tsakanin al'adu daban-daban a duniya.
description.yo: Dagbasoke ogbon ibaraẹnisọrọ fun ayika oniruuru ni agbaye.
description.am: በባህላዊ አካባቢዎች በትክክል ለመገናኘት ችሎታዎትን ያድጉ።
description.zu: Thuthukisa amakhono akho okuxhumana ezimweni eziningi zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Meziwanye nka nkwurịta okwu n’etiti omenala dị iche iche n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e communication interculturelle e aduna.

description.fr: Apprenez à anticiper, gérer et atténuer les effets des catastrophes naturelles à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Learn to anticipate, manage, and mitigate the effects of natural disasters worldwide.
description.ar: تعلم التنبؤ بالكوارث الطبيعية وإدارتها والتخفيف من آثارها على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze kutabiri, kusimamia na kupunguza athari za maafa ya asili duniani.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake hango, gudanar da rage illar ibtila'in dabi'a a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ bi o ṣe le ṣaju, ṣakoso ati dinku ipa ajalu adayeba ni agbaye.
description.am: የተፈጥሮ አደጋዎችን ለመቅደም፣ ለማስተዳደር እና ለመቀነስ ተግባራትን ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukubikezela, ukuphatha nokunciphisa imiphumela yezinhlekelele zemvelo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi atụ anya, jikwaa na belata mmetụta ọdachi eke n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion catastrophes naturelles e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les concepts fondamentaux de la sociologie et leur application dans des sociétés variées à travers le monde.
description.en: Discover the fundamental concepts of sociology and their application in diverse societies worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف المفاهيم الأساسية لعلم الاجتماع وتطبيقها في مجتمعات متنوعة حول العالم.
description.sw: Gundua dhana kuu za sosholojia na matumizi yake katika jamii mbalimbali duniani.
description.ha: Bincika muhimman ka'idojin ilimin zamantakewa da amfani da su a al'ummomi daban-daban a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn imọran ipilẹ ti imọ awujọ ati lilo wọn ni awọn awujọ oriṣiriṣi ni agbaye.
description.am: የሶሲዮሎጂ መሠረታዊ ግንዛቤዎችን እና በዓለም ዙሪያ በተለያዩ ማህበረሰቦች ውስጥ መተግበሪያዎቹን ያስሱ።
description.zu: Hlola imiqondo eyisisekelo ye-sociology nokusetshenziswa kwayo emiphakathini ehlukahlukene emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha isi echiche sociology na ojiji ya n’ime obodo dị iche iche n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e sociologie e aduna.

title.fr: Gestion de l’eau à l’échelle mondiale

description.fr: Maîtrisez les enjeux et solutions de la gestion de l’eau dans différents contextes internationaux.
description.en: Master the challenges and solutions of water management in various international contexts.
description.ar: إتقان تحديات وحلول إدارة المياه في سياقات دولية مختلفة.
description.sw: Bobea katika changamoto na suluhisho za usimamizi wa maji katika mazingira ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Kware da kalubale da mafita na gudanar da ruwa a duniya.
description.yo: Mọ awọn italaya ati awọn ojutu isakoso omi ni ayika agbaye.
description.am: የውሃ አስተዳደር ችግሮችን እና መፍትሄዎችን በዓለም አቀፍ አካባቢዎች ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda izinselele nezixazululo zokuphatha amanzi ezimweni ezahlukene zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Mụta ihe isi ike na ngwọta njikwa mmiri n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion eau internationale e waawde gese.

description.fr: Découvrez les grandes questions et courants de la philosophie à travers l’histoire et les cultures du monde.
description.en: Discover the major questions and schools of philosophy throughout history and world cultures.
description.ar: اكتشف الأسئلة الكبرى والمدارس الفلسفية عبر التاريخ والثقافات العالمية.
description.sw: Gundua maswali makubwa na shule za falsafa katika historia na tamaduni za dunia.
description.ha: Bincika manyan tambayoyi da makarantu na falsafa a tarihi da al'adu na duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ibeere nla ati awọn ile-iwe falsafa ni itan ati awọn aṣa agbaye.
description.am: የፍልስፍና ትምህርቶችን እና ትምህርቶችን በታሪክ እና በዓለም ባህላዊ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola imibuzo emikhulu nezikole zephilosophy emlandweni nasemasikweni omhlaba.
description.ig: Nyocha ajụjụ ukwu na ụlọ akwụkwọ philosophy n’akụkọ ihe mere eme na omenala ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e philosophie e aduna.

description.fr: Explorez les bases de l’ingénierie civile et ses applications dans la construction et l’aménagement urbain à l’international.
description.en: Explore the basics of civil engineering and its applications in construction and urban planning worldwide.
description.ar: استكشف أساسيات الهندسة المدنية وتطبيقاتها في البناء والتخطيط الحضري على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze misingi ya uhandisi wa kiraia na matumizi yake katika ujenzi na upangaji wa miji duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi tushen injiniyan gine-gine da amfani da shi a gine-gine da tsara birane a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ ipilẹ imọ-ẹrọ ilu ati awọn lilo rẹ ninu ikole ati eto ilu ni kariaye.
description.am: የሲቪል ኢንጅነሪንግ መሠረቶችን እና በመገናኛ እና በከተማ እቅድ ውስጥ መተግበሪያዎቹን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Funda izisekelo ze-civil engineering nokusetshenziswa kwayo ekwakhiweni nasekuhlelweni kwamadolobha emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta isi civil engineering na ojiji ya n’ime ụlọ na nhazi obodo n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e génie civil e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les fondements de la linguistique et l’étude des langues à travers le monde.
description.en: Discover the foundations of linguistics and the study of languages around the world.
description.ar: اكتشف أسس اللسانيات ودراسة اللغات حول العالم.
description.sw: Gundua misingi ya isimu na uchunguzi wa lugha duniani kote.
description.ha: Bincika tushen ilimin harshe da nazarin harsuna a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari ipilẹ imọ-ọrọ ede ati ẹkọ awọn ede ni agbaye.
description.am: የቋንቋ ስምንት መሠረቶችን እና በዓለም ዙሪያ የቋንቋ ጥናትን ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izisekelo ze-linguistics nokufunda izilimi emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha isi linguistics na ọmụmụ asụsụ n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e linguistique e aduna.

description.fr: Apprenez à piloter des projets d’innovation sociale à l’international, de l’idée à l’impact.
description.en: Learn to lead social innovation projects internationally, from idea to impact.
description.ar: تعلم قيادة مشاريع الابتكار الاجتماعي على المستوى الدولي، من الفكرة إلى التأثير.
description.sw: Jifunze kuongoza miradi ya ubunifu wa kijamii kimataifa, kutoka wazo hadi athari.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake jagorantar ayyukan kirkirar jama'a a duniya, daga tunani zuwa tasiri.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati dari awọn ise akanṣe imotuntun awujọ ni kariaye, lati ero si ipa.
description.am: የማህበራዊ አዳዲስነት ፕሮጀክቶችን በዓለም አቀፍ ይመሩ፣ ከሃሳብ እስከ ተፅእኖ።
description.zu: Funda ukuhola amaphrojekthi okuqamba okusha komphakathi emhlabeni wonke, kusukela embonweni kuya emtheleleni.
description.ig: Mụta idu oru mmepe ọhụụ obodo n’uwa niile, site n’echiche ruo n’imepụta mmetụta.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion innovation sociale e aduna.

title.ha: Ilimin Halayyar Kyau da Jin Dadi
title.ig: Psychology dị mma na ịdị mma

description.fr: Découvrez les principes de la psychologie positive et comment favoriser le bien-être dans tous les contextes culturels.
description.en: Discover the principles of positive psychology and how to foster well-being in all cultural contexts.
description.ar: اكتشف مبادئ علم النفس الإيجابي وكيفية تعزيز الرفاهية في جميع السياقات الثقافية.
description.sw: Gundua misingi ya saikolojia chanya na jinsi ya kukuza ustawi katika mazingira yote ya kitamaduni.
description.ha: Bincika ka'idojin ilimin halayyar kyau da yadda ake inganta jin dadi a kowanne yanayi na al'adu.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ilana imọ-ọrọ iwa rere ati bi a ṣe le mu alafia pọ si ni gbogbo ayika aṣa.
description.am: የአዎንታዊ ሳይኮሎጂ መሠረቶችን እና በሁሉም ባህላዊ አካባቢዎች ደህንነትን እንዴት ማሳደግ እንደሚቻል ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izimiso ze-positive psychology nokuthi ungayikhuthaza kanjani inhlalakahle kuzo zonke izimo zamasiko.
description.ig: Nyocha ụkpụrụ psychology dị mma na otu esi eme ka ịdị mma dịkwuo elu n’ime omenala niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e psychologie positive e waawde gese.

description.fr: Apprenez à concevoir, planifier et gérer des projets culturels dans des contextes internationaux.
description.en: Learn to design, plan, and manage cultural projects in international contexts.
description.ar: تعلم تصميم وتخطيط وإدارة المشاريع الثقافية في السياقات الدولية.
description.sw: Jifunze kubuni, kupanga na kusimamia miradi ya kitamaduni katika mazingira ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake tsara, shiryawa da gudanar da ayyukan al'adu a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe apẹrẹ, gbero ati ṣakoso awọn ise agbese asa ni ayika agbaye.
description.am: የባህላዊ ፕሮጀክቶችን እንዴት መንደባበር፣ መያዝ እና ማስተዳደር እንደሚቻል በዓለም አቀፍ አካባቢዎች ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuklama, ukuhlela nokuphatha amaphrojekthi amasiko ezimweni zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Mụta imewe, imepụta na njikwa oru omenala n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion projet culturel e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les bases de la robotique et ses applications dans l’industrie, la santé et l’éducation à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Discover the basics of robotics and its applications in industry, health, and education worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف أساسيات الروبوتات وتطبيقاتها في الصناعة والصحة والتعليم على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze misingi ya roboti na matumizi yake katika viwanda, afya na elimu duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi tushen robot da amfani da shi a masana'antu, lafiya da ilimi a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ ipilẹ roboti ati awọn lilo rẹ ni ile-iṣẹ, ilera ati eto-ẹkọ ni agbaye.
description.am: የሮቦቲክስ መሠረቶችን እና በኢንዱስትሪ፣ ጤና እና ትምህርት ውስጥ መተግበሪያዎቹን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Funda izisekelo zerobhothi nokusetshenziswa kwayo embonini, kwezempilo nakwezemfundo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta isi robotik na ojiji ya n’ụlọ ọrụ, ahú ike na mmụta n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e robotique e aduna.

title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Droit des Affaires

description.fr: Comprenez les règles et pratiques du droit des affaires dans un contexte international.
description.en: Understand the rules and practices of business law in an international context.
description.ar: فهم قواعد وممارسات قانون الأعمال في السياق الدولي.
description.sw: Elewa kanuni na mbinu za sheria ya biashara katika mazingira ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Fahimci dokoki da hanyoyin dokar kasuwanci a duniya.
description.yo: Loye awọn ofin ati iṣe ofin iṣowo ni ayika agbaye.
description.am: የአለም ንግድ ህግ ህጎችን እና ልምዶችን በዓለም አቀፍ አካባቢ ያስተውሉ።
description.zu: Qonda imithetho namasu omthetho webhizinisi ezimweni zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Ghọta iwu na omume iwu azụmahịa n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e droit des affaires e aduna.

title.sw: Sayansi ya Hali ya Hewa na Mabadiliko ya Tabianchi
title.am: የአየር ንብረት ሳይንስ እና የአየር ንብረት ለውጦች

description.fr: Analysez les phénomènes climatiques et les enjeux du changement climatique à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Analyze climate phenomena and the challenges of climate change on a global scale.
description.ar: تحليل الظواهر المناخية وتحديات التغير المناخي على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Chambua matukio ya hali ya hewa na changamoto za mabadiliko ya tabianchi duniani.
description.ha: Bincika abubuwan da ke faruwa a yanayi da kalubalen sauyin yanayi a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣe itupalẹ awọn iṣẹlẹ oju-ọjọ ati awọn italaya iyipada oju-ọjọ ni agbaye.
description.am: የአየር ንብረት ክስተቶችን እና የአየር ንብረት ለውጦችን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያስተውሉ።
description.zu: Hlaziya izehlakalo zesimo sezulu nezinkinga zokuguquka kwesimo sezulu emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha ihe omume ihu igwe na ihe isi ike mgbanwe ihu igwe n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e climatologie e aduna.

title.fr: Gestion de la diversité en entreprise

description.fr: Apprenez à valoriser la diversité et à promouvoir l’inclusion dans les organisations internationales.
description.en: Learn to value diversity and promote inclusion in international organizations.
description.ar: تعلم تقدير التنوع وتعزيز الشمول في المؤسسات الدولية.
description.sw: Jifunze kuthamini utofauti na kukuza ujumuishaji katika mashirika ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake daraja bambanci da inganta shigar kowa a kungiyoyin duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati fiye si oniruuru ati igbega ifaminsi ni awọn ajo kariaye.
description.am: በዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅቶች ተለዋዋጭነትን ያከብሩ እና አካባቢ ያለ ማስተዳደርን ያስተዋውቁ።
description.zu: Funda ukubaluleka kwezinhlobonhlobo nokukhuthaza ukufakwa ezinhlanganweni zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Mụta ime ka iche iche baa uru na ime ka itinye mmadụ niile baa uru n’òtù mba ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion diversité e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les concepts clés de la microéconomie et leur application dans les marchés mondiaux.
description.en: Discover key concepts of microeconomics and their application in global markets.
description.ar: اكتشف المفاهيم الرئيسية للاقتصاد الجزئي وتطبيقها في الأسواق العالمية.
description.sw: Gundua dhana kuu za microeconomics na matumizi yake katika masoko ya dunia.
description.ha: Bincika muhimman ka'idojin microeconomics da amfani da su a kasuwannin duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn imọran pataki ti microeconomics ati lilo wọn ni awọn ọja agbaye.
description.am: የሚክሮ ኢኮኖሚክስ ቁልፍ ግንዛቤዎችን እና በዓለም ገበያዎች ውስጥ መተግበሪያዎቹን ያስሱ።
description.zu: Hlola imiqondo eyinhloko ye-microeconomics nokusetshenziswa kwayo ezimakethe zomhlaba.
description.ig: Nyocha isi echiche microeconomics na ojiji ya n’ahịa mba ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e microéconomie e aduna.

title.yo: Aabo Kọmputa To ti ni Ilọsiwaju

description.fr: Maîtrisez les techniques avancées de sécurité informatique pour protéger les systèmes et les données à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Master advanced computer security techniques to protect systems and data internationally.
description.ar: إتقان تقنيات أمان الحاسوب المتقدمة لحماية الأنظمة والبيانات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Bobea katika mbinu za juu za usalama wa kompyuta kulinda mifumo na data duniani.
description.ha: Kware da hanyoyin tsaron kwamfuta mai zurfi don kare tsarin kwamfuta da bayanai a duniya.
description.yo: Mọ awọn ọna aabo kọmputa to ti ni ilọsiwaju lati daabobo awọn eto ati data ni kariaye.
description.am: የላቀ ኮምፒውተር ደህንነት መሣሪያዎችን ይማሩ እና ስርዓቶችን እና ውሂብን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያድኑ።
description.zu: Funda amasu athuthukile okuphepha kwekhompuyutha ukuvikela amasistimu nedatha emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta usoro nchekwa kọmputa elu iji chebe usoro na data n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e sécurité informatique e aduna.

description.fr: Apprenez à piloter l’innovation technologique dans les entreprises et organisations à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Learn to lead technological innovation in companies and organizations worldwide.
description.ar: تعلم قيادة الابتكار التكنولوجي في الشركات والمنظمات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze kuongoza ubunifu wa kiteknolojia katika kampuni na mashirika duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake jagorantar kirkirar fasaha a kamfanoni da kungiyoyi a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati dari imotuntun imọ-ẹrọ ni awọn ile-iṣẹ ati awọn ajo ni kariaye.
description.am: የቴክኖሎጂ አዳዲስነት ፕሮጀክቶችን በዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅቶች ይመሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuhola ukuqamba okusha kwezobuchwepheshe ezinkampanini nasezinhlanganweni emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta idu oru mmepe ọhụụ teknụzụ n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion innovation technologique e aduna.

description.fr: Apprenez les bases de la programmation web et développez vos premières applications accessibles partout dans le monde.
description.en: Learn the basics of web programming and develop your first applications accessible worldwide.
description.ar: تعلم أساسيات برمجة الويب وطور تطبيقاتك الأولى المتاحة في جميع أنحاء العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze misingi ya uprogramu wa wavuti na tengeneza programu zako za kwanza zinazopatikana duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi tushen shirye-shiryen yanar gizo da kirkirar aikace-aikacen farko da ake iya samu a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ ipilẹ eto wẹẹbu ki o si ṣe awọn ohun elo akọkọ rẹ ti o le wọle si ni gbogbo agbaye.
description.am: የድህረ ገጽ ፕሮግራሚንግ መሠረቶችን ይማሩ እና የመጀመሪያ መተግበሪያዎችን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያዘጋጁ።
description.zu: Funda izisekelo zokuhlela iwebhu futhi wakhe izinhlelo zakho zokuqala ezitholakala emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta isi mmemme web ma mepụta ngwa mbụ gị a pụrụ iji n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e programmation web e aduna.

description.fr: Comprenez les principes de la propriété intellectuelle et leur importance dans l’innovation et la création à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Understand the principles of intellectual property and their importance in innovation and creation worldwide.
description.ar: فهم مبادئ الملكية الفكرية وأهميتها في الابتكار والإبداع على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Elewa misingi ya miliki ya kifedha na umuhimu wake katika ubunifu na uundaji duniani kote.
description.ha: Fahimci ka'idojin dukiyar ilimi da muhimmancinta a kirkira da kirkira a duniya.
description.yo: Loye awọn ilana ohun-ini oye ati pataki rẹ ninu imotuntun ati ẹda ni agbaye.
description.am: የአእምሮ ንብረት መሠረቶችን እና በፈጠራ እና አዳዲስነት ያለውን አስፈላጊነት በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Qonda izimiso zefa yobuhlakani nokubaluleka kwayo ekuqambeni nasekuqambeni emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Ghọta ụkpụrụ ihe onwunwe ọgụgụ isi na mkpa ya n’ime mmepe ọhụụ na imepụta ihe n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e propriété intellectuelle e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux géopolitiques contemporains et leur impact sur les relations internationales.
description.en: Discover contemporary geopolitical issues and their impact on international relations.
description.ar: اكتشف القضايا الجيوسياسية المعاصرة وتأثيرها على العلاقات الدولية.
description.sw: Gundua masuala ya kisasa ya jiografia ya kisiasa na athari zake kwa uhusiano wa kimataifa.
description.ha: Bincika batutuwan geopolitics na zamani da tasirinsu a dangantakar kasashen duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ọran geopolitics ode oni ati ipa wọn lori ibasepọ kariaye.
description.am: ዘመናዊ የጂዮፖለቲክስ ጉዳዮችን እና በዓለም አቀፍ ግንኙነት ላይ ያላቸውን ተፅእኖ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izindaba zamanje ze-geopolitics nomthelela wazo ebudlelwaneni bamazwe ngamazwe.
description.ig: Nyocha nsogbu geopolitics ugbua na mmetụta ya n’ime mmekọrịta mba ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e géopolitique e aduna.

description.fr: Maîtrisez les outils et méthodes pour assurer la qualité dans les organisations à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Master tools and methods to ensure quality in organizations worldwide.
description.ar: إتقان الأدوات والأساليب لضمان الجودة في المؤسسات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Bobea katika zana na mbinu za kuhakikisha ubora katika mashirika duniani kote.
description.ha: Kware da kayan aiki da hanyoyin tabbatar da inganci a kungiyoyi a duniya.
description.yo: Mọ awọn irinṣẹ ati ọna lati rii daju didara ni awọn ajo ni agbaye.
description.am: የጥራት መሣሪያዎችን እና ዘዴዎችን ይማሩ እና በዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅቶች ውስጥ ጥራትን ያረጋግጡ።
description.zu: Funda amathuluzi nezindlela zokuqinisekisa ikhwalithi ezinhlanganweni emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta ngwá ọrụ na usoro iji jide ogo n’òtù n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion qualité e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les mécanismes de la finance verte et leur rôle dans la transition écologique mondiale.
description.en: Discover the mechanisms of green finance and its role in the global ecological transition.
description.ar: اكتشف آليات التمويل الأخضر ودوره في التحول البيئي العالمي.
description.sw: Gundua mbinu za fedha za kijani na jukumu lake katika mabadiliko ya mazingira duniani.
description.ha: Bincika hanyoyin kudaden kore da rawar da suke takawa a sauyin muhalli na duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ilana iṣuna alawọ ewe ati ipa rẹ ninu iyipada ayika agbaye.
description.am: የአረንጓዴ ፋይናንስ መንገዶችን እና በዓለም አቀፍ አካባቢ የአካባቢ ለውጥ ላይ ያለውን ሚና ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izindlela ze-green finance nomthelela wayo ekuguqukeni kwemvelo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha usoro green finance na ọrụ ya n’ime mgbanwe gburugburu ebe obibi n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e finance verte e aduna.

title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Psychologie du Développement

description.fr: Explorez les étapes du développement humain et les facteurs qui influencent la croissance à travers les cultures.
description.en: Explore the stages of human development and the factors influencing growth across cultures.
description.ar: استكشف مراحل النمو البشري والعوامل التي تؤثر على النمو عبر الثقافات.
description.sw: Gundua hatua za ukuaji wa binadamu na mambo yanayoathiri ukuaji katika tamaduni mbalimbali.
description.ha: Bincika matakan ci gaban dan adam da abubuwan da ke shafar ci gaba a al'adu daban-daban.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ipele idagbasoke eniyan ati awọn ifosiwewe ti o ni ipa lori idagbasoke kọja awọn aṣa.
description.am: የሰው እድገት ደረጃዎችን እና በባህላዊ አካባቢዎች ላይ የሚያሳዩ ምክንያቶችን ያስሱ።
description.zu: Hlola izigaba zokukhula komuntu nezinto ezithinta ukukhula phakathi kwezizwe.
description.ig: Nyocha usoro mmepe mmadụ na ihe na-emetụta mmepe n’ime omenala dị iche iche.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e psychologie du développement e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les bases de la data science et ses applications dans l’analyse de données à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Discover the basics of data science and its applications in data analysis worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف أساسيات علم البيانات وتطبيقاته في تحليل البيانات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze misingi ya sayansi ya takwimu na matumizi yake katika uchambuzi wa data duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi tushen ilimin bayanai da amfani da shi a nazarin bayanai a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ ipilẹ imọ-ọrọ data ati awọn lilo rẹ ninu itupalẹ data ni kariaye.
description.am: የውሂብ ሳይንስ መሠረቶችን እና በዓለም አቀፍ የውሂብ ትንተና ውስጥ መተግበሪያዎቹን ያውቁ።
description.zu: Funda izisekelo ze-data science nokusetshenziswa kwayo ekuhlaziyeni idatha emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta isi data science na ojiji ya n’ime nyocha data n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e data science e aduna.

description.fr: Apprenez à organiser et gérer des événements professionnels, culturels ou sportifs à l’international.
description.en: Learn to organize and manage professional, cultural, or sports events internationally.
description.ar: تعلم تنظيم وإدارة الفعاليات المهنية أو الثقافية أو الرياضية على المستوى الدولي.
description.sw: Jifunze kupanga na kusimamia matukio ya kitaalamu, kitamaduni au michezo duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake tsara da gudanar da taron sana'a, al'adu ko wasanni a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣeto ati ṣakoso awọn iṣẹlẹ iṣẹ, asa tabi ere idaraya ni kariaye.
description.am: የሙያ፣ የባህላዊ ወይም የስፖርት ክስተቶችን በዓለም አቀፍ ያዘጋጁ እና ያስተዳድሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuhlela nokuphatha imicimbi yobungcweti, yamasiko noma yezemidlalo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta imepụta na njikwa ihe omume ọrụ, omenala ma ọ bụ egwuregwu n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion événementiel e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les spécificités de la logistique humanitaire et son rôle dans la gestion des crises internationales.
description.en: Discover the specifics of humanitarian logistics and its role in managing international crises.
description.ar: اكتشف خصوصيات اللوجستيات الإنسانية ودورها في إدارة الأزمات الدولية.
description.sw: Gundua upekee wa usafirishaji wa kibinadamu na jukumu lake katika kusimamia migogoro ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Bincika keɓantattun halaye na sufuri jin kai da rawar da take takawa wajen tafiyar da rikice-rikicen duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn pato iṣakoso ipese eniyan ati ipa rẹ ninu iṣakoso pajawiri kariaye.
description.am: የሰብአዊ ሎጂስቲክስ ልዩነቶችን እና በዓለም አቀፍ ክስተቶች ማስተዳደር ላይ ያለውን ሚና ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izici ezithile ze-humanitarian logistics nomthelela wayo ekuphathweni kwezinxushunxushu zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha ihe pụrụ iche humanitarian logistics na ọrụ ya n’ime njikwa nsogbu mba ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e logistique humanitaire e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les bases de la cryptographie et son importance pour la sécurité des données à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Discover the basics of cryptography and its importance for data security worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف أساسيات التشفير وأهميته لأمن البيانات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze misingi ya usimbaji na umuhimu wake kwa usalama wa data duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi tushen cryptography da muhimmancinta ga tsaron bayanai a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ ipilẹ cryptography ati pataki rẹ fun aabo data ni kariaye.
description.am: የክሪፕቶግራፊ መሠረቶችን እና ለውሂብ ደህንነት በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ያለውን አስፈላጊነት ያውቁ።
description.zu: Funda izisekelo ze-cryptography nokubaluleka kwayo ekuvikeleni idatha emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta isi cryptography na mkpa ya maka nchekwa data n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e cryptographie e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion des talents
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion des Talents

description.fr: Apprenez à identifier, développer et fidéliser les talents dans les organisations internationales.
description.en: Learn to identify, develop, and retain talents in international organizations.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تحديد وتطوير والاحتفاظ بالمواهب في المؤسسات الدولية.
description.sw: Jifunze kutambua, kukuza na kuhifadhi vipaji katika mashirika ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake gano, bunkasa da kula da baiwa a kungiyoyin duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe idanimọ, dagbasoke ati tọju talent ni awọn ajo kariaye.
description.am: ችሎታዎችን በዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅቶች ለመለየት፣ ለማሳደግ እና ለማስቀመጥ ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukukhomba, ukuthuthukisa nokugcina amakhono ezinhlanganweni zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Mụta ịchọpụta, imeziwanye na idobe talent n’òtù mba ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion des talents e aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les principes de l’économie numérique et son impact sur les marchés mondiaux.
description.en: Discover the principles of the digital economy and its impact on global markets.
description.ar: اكتشف مبادئ الاقتصاد الرقمي وتأثيره على الأسواق العالمية.
description.sw: Gundua misingi ya uchumi wa kidijitali na athari zake kwenye masoko ya dunia.
description.ha: Bincika ka'idojin tattalin arzikin dijital da tasirinsa a kasuwannin duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ilana ise-aje dijitalu ati ipa rẹ lori awọn ọja agbaye.
description.am: የዲጂታል ኢኮኖሚ መሠረቶችን እና በዓለም ገበያዎች ላይ ያለውን ተፅእኖ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izimiso zomnotho wedijithali nomthelela wawo ezimakethe zomhlaba.
description.ig: Nyocha ụkpụrụ digital economy na mmetụta ya n’ahịa mba ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e economie numérique e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion des ONG
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة المنظمات غير الحكومية

description.fr: Apprenez à gérer efficacement une ONG dans un contexte international.
description.en: Learn to effectively manage an NGO in an international context.
description.ar: تعلم إدارة منظمة غير حكومية بفعالية في سياق دولي.
description.sw: Jifunze kusimamia NGO kwa ufanisi katika mazingira ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake gudanar da NGO yadda ya kamata a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣakoso NGO ni imunadoko ni ayika agbaye.
description.am: NGO አስተዳደርን በዓለም አቀፍ አካባቢ በትክክል ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuphatha i-NGO kahle ezimweni zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Mụta njikwa NGO n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion ONG e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la santé mentale
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Afya ya Akili
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Lafiyar Hankali
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion Santé Mentale

description.fr: Découvrez les stratégies pour promouvoir la santé mentale dans des contextes multiculturels.
description.en: Discover strategies to promote mental health in multicultural contexts.
description.ar: اكتشف استراتيجيات تعزيز الصحة النفسية في سياقات متعددة الثقافات.
description.sw: Gundua mikakati ya kukuza afya ya akili katika mazingira ya tamaduni nyingi.
description.ha: Bincika dabarun inganta lafiyar hankali a al'adu daban-daban.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ilana lati mu ilera ọpọlọ pọ si ni ayika oniruuru.
description.am: የአእምሮ ጤናን በባህላዊ አካባቢዎች ለማሳደግ ዘዴዎችን ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola amasu okukhuthaza impilo yengqondo ezimweni eziningi zamasiko.
description.ig: Nyocha usoro imeziwanye ahú ike uche n’ime omenala dị iche iche.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion santé mentale e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de l’environnement

description.fr: Apprenez à gérer durablement les ressources naturelles et à protéger l’environnement à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Learn to sustainably manage natural resources and protect the environment worldwide.
description.ar: تعلم إدارة الموارد الطبيعية بشكل مستدام وحماية البيئة على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Jifunze kusimamia rasilimali asili kwa njia endelevu na kulinda mazingira duniani kote.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake kula da albarkatun kasa da kare muhalli a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ isakoso oro adayeba alagbero ati aabo ayika ni agbaye.
description.am: የተፈጥሮ ሀብትን በተስተናጋጅ ሁኔታ አስተዳደር እና አካባቢን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ይጠብቁ።
description.zu: Funda ukuphatha izinsiza zemvelo ngendlela esimeme nokuvikela imvelo emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta njikwa akụ na ụba eke nchekwa na ichekwa gburugburu ebe obibi n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion environnement e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la communication

description.fr: Découvrez les stratégies de gestion de la communication dans les organisations internationales.
description.en: Discover communication management strategies in international organizations.
description.ar: اكتشف استراتيجيات إدارة الاتصال في المؤسسات الدولية.
description.sw: Gundua mikakati ya usimamizi wa mawasiliano katika mashirika ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Bincika dabarun gudanar da sadarwa a kungiyoyin duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ilana isakoso ibaraẹnisọrọ ni awọn ajo kariaye.
description.am: የኮሚዩኒኬሽን አስተዳደር ዘዴዎችን በዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅቶች ውስጥ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola amasu okuphatha ezokuxhumana ezinhlanganweni zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha usoro njikwa nkwurịta okwu n’òtù mba ụwa.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion communication e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de l’innovation technologique
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Ubunifu wa Kiteknolojia

description.fr: Découvrez comment piloter l’innovation technologique dans les entreprises à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Discover how to lead technological innovation in companies worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف كيفية قيادة الابتكار التكنولوجي في الشركات على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Gundua jinsi ya kuongoza ubunifu wa kiteknolojia katika kampuni duniani kote.
description.ha: Bincika yadda ake jagorantar kirkirar fasaha a kamfanoni a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari bi o ṣe le dari imotuntun imọ-ẹrọ ni awọn ile-iṣẹ ni kariaye.
description.am: የቴክኖሎጂ አዳዲስነት ፕሮጀክቶችን በዓለም አቀፍ ድርጅቶች ይመሩ።
description.zu: Hlola ukuthi ungahola kanjani ukuqamba okusha kwezobuchwepheshe ezinkampanini emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha otu esi idu oru mmepe ọhụụ teknụzụ n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion innovation technologique e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la sécurité alimentaire
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usalama wa Chakula

title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion Sécurité Alimentaire

description.fr: Apprenez à gérer la sécurité alimentaire et à anticiper les crises dans un contexte international.
description.en: Learn to manage food security and anticipate crises in an international context.
description.ar: تعلم إدارة الأمن الغذائي والتنبؤ بالأزمات في سياق دولي.
description.sw: Jifunze kusimamia usalama wa chakula na kutabiri migogoro katika mazingira ya kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake gudanar da tsaron abinci da hango rikice-rikice a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣakoso aabo ounje ati ṣaju awọn pajawiri ni ayika agbaye.
description.am: የምግብ ደህንነትን በዓለም አቀፍ አካባቢ ያስተዳድሩ እና ክስተቶችን ያስቀድሱ።
description.zu: Funda ukuphatha ukuphepha kokudla nokubikezela izimo eziphuthumayo ezimweni zomhlaba wonke.
description.ig: Mụta njikwa nchekwa nri na ịtụ anya nsogbu n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion sécurité alimentaire e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la mobilité urbaine
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usafiri wa Mjini
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Sufurin Birni
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion Mobilité Urbaine

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux et solutions de la mobilité urbaine dans les grandes villes du monde.
description.en: Discover the challenges and solutions of urban mobility in major cities worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف تحديات وحلول التنقل الحضري في المدن الكبرى حول العالم.
description.sw: Gundua changamoto na suluhisho za usafiri wa mijini katika miji mikubwa duniani.
description.ha: Bincika kalubale da mafita na sufuri a manyan birane a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn italaya ati awọn ojutu irin-ajo ilu ni awọn ilu nla ni agbaye.
description.am: የከተማ እንቅስቃሴ ችግሮችን እና መፍትሄዎችን በዓለም አቀፍ ከተሞች ውስጥ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izinselele nezixazululo zokuhamba kwedolobha emadolobheni amakhulu emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha ihe isi ike na ngwọta njem n’obodo ukwu n’uwa niile.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la propriété foncière

description.fr: Apprenez à gérer la propriété foncière et à comprendre les enjeux juridiques à l’international.

description.ar: تعلم إدارة الملكية العقارية وفهم القضايا القانونية على المستوى الدولي.
description.sw: Jifunze kusimamia mali ya ardhi na kuelewa masuala ya kisheria kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake gudanar da mallakar kasa da fahimtar batutuwan doka a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣakoso ohun-ini ilẹ ati loye awọn ọran ofin ni kariaye.
description.am: የመሬት ንብረትን አስተዳደር ይማሩ እና የህግ ጉዳዮችን በዓለም አቀፍ ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuphatha ifa yomhlaba nokwazi izindaba zomthetho emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta njikwa ihe onwunwe ala na nghọta nsogbu iwu n’uwa niile.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la qualité de l’air
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Ubora wa Hewa
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Ingancin Iska
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion Qualité Air

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux de la qualité de l’air et les stratégies de gestion à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Discover air quality issues and management strategies internationally.
description.ar: اكتشف قضايا جودة الهواء واستراتيجيات الإدارة على المستوى الدولي.
description.sw: Gundua masuala ya ubora wa hewa na mikakati ya usimamizi kimataifa.
description.ha: Bincika batutuwan ingancin iska da dabarun gudanarwa a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ọran didara afẹfẹ ati awọn ilana isakoso ni kariaye.
description.am: የአየር ጥራት ጉዳዮችን እና የአስተዳደር ዘዴዎችን በዓለም አቀፍ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izinkinga zekhwalithi yomoya namasu okuphatha emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Nyocha nsogbu didara afẹfẹ na usoro njikwa ya n’uwa niile.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e gestion qualité air e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion des ressources humaines internationales
title.en: Introduction to International Human Resources Management
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة الموارد البشرية الدولية
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Rasilimali Watu wa Kimataifa
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Ma'aikata na Duniya
title.yo: Ifihan si Isakoso Eda Eniyan Kariaye
title.am: ዓለም አቀፍ የሰው ኃይል አስተዳደር መግቢያ

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux et pratiques de la gestion des ressources humaines dans un contexte international et multiculturel.
description.en: Discover the challenges and practices of human resources management in an international and multicultural context.
description.ar: اكتشف تحديات وممارسات إدارة الموارد البشرية في سياق دولي ومتعدد الثقافات.
description.sw: Gundua changamoto na mbinu za usimamizi wa rasilimali watu katika mazingira ya kimataifa na tamaduni nyingi.
description.ha: Bincika kalubale da hanyoyin gudanar da ma'aikata a duniya da al'adu daban-daban.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn italaya ati awọn iṣe isakoso eda eniyan ni ayika kariaye ati oniruuru.
description.am: የሰው ኃይል አስተዳደር ችግሮችን እና ልምዶችን በዓለም አቀፍ እና ባህላዊ አካባቢ ያውቁ።
description.zu: Hlola izinselele namasu okuphatha abasebenzi ezimweni zomhlaba wonke nezamasiko amaningi.
description.ig: Nyocha ihe isi ike na omume njikwa mmadụ n’ọrụ n’uwa niile na omenala dị iche iche.
description.ff: Hokkude binndi e RH international e aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la sécurité informatique
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة أمن تكنولوجيا المعلومات
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usalama wa IT
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Tsaron IT

description.fr: Apprenez à protéger les systèmes d’information et à gérer les risques numériques à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Learn to protect information systems and manage digital risks internationally.
description.ar: تعلم حماية أنظمة المعلومات وإدارة المخاطر الرقمية على المستوى الدولي.
description.sw: Jifunze kulinda mifumo ya habari na kusimamia hatari za kidijitali kimataifa.

title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Tattalin Arzikin Kananan Hanya

description.fr: Comprenez les principes de la microéconomie et leur application dans la gestion des entreprises.
description.en: Understand the principles of microeconomics and their application in business management.
description.ar: تعرف على مبادئ الاقتصاد الجزئي وتطبيقها في إدارة الأعمال.
description.sw: Elewa misingi ya uchumi mdogo na matumizi yake katika usimamizi wa biashara.
description.ha: Fahimci ka'idojin tattalin arzikin kananan hanya da amfani da su a gudanar da kasuwanci.
description.yo: Ni oye lori ilana ise-aje kekere ati lilo rẹ ninu isakoso iṣowo.
description.am: የትንሽ ኢኮኖሚ መሠረቶችን እና በንግድ አስተዳደር ውስጥ ያለውን ተግባር ያስሩ።
description.zu: Qonda izimiso zomnotho omncane nokusetshenziswa kwazo ekuphathweni kwamabhizinisi.
description.ig: Ghota ụkpụrụ microeconomics na ojiji ha n’ime njikwa azụmahịa.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji microéconomie e jamfaaji e nder gestion entreprise.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la logistique humanitaire
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usafirishaji wa Kibinadamu
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Kayayyakin Jin Kai

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux et méthodes de la logistique humanitaire à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Discover the challenges and methods of humanitarian logistics on an international scale.
description.ar: اكتشف التحديات والأساليب للوجستيات الإنسانية على المستوى الدولي.
description.sw: Gundua changamoto na mbinu za usafirishaji wa kibinadamu kimataifa.
description.ha: Gano kalubale da hanyoyin gudanar da kayayyakin jin kai a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn italaya ati awọn ọna isakoso pq eniyan ni kariaye.
description.am: በአለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የሰብዓዊ ሎጂስቲክስ ችግኝነቶችን እና ዘዴዎችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Thola izinselele nezindlela zokuphatha ezokuthutha obuntu emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Chọpụta nsogbu na ụzọ esi ejikwa logistics mmadụ n’ụwa niile.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji logistique humanitaire e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

description.fr: Découvrez les bases de la cryptographie et ses applications dans la sécurité informatique.
description.en: Discover the basics of cryptography and its applications in computer security.
description.ar: اكتشف أساسيات علم التشفير وتطبيقاته في أمن المعلومات.
description.sw: Gundua misingi ya kriptografia na matumizi yake katika usalama wa kompyuta.
description.ha: Gano tushen ilimin lambar sirri da amfani da shi a tsaron kwamfuta.
description.yo: Ṣawari ipilẹ imọ-ọrọ asiri ati lilo rẹ ninu aabo kọmputa.
description.am: የክሪፕቶግራፊ መሠረቶችን እና በኮምፒውተር ደህንነት ውስጥ ያለውን ተግባር ያስሩ።
description.zu: Hlola izisekelo ze-cryptography nokusetshenziswa kwayo ekuvikelekeni kwekhompyutha.
description.ig: Nyocha ntọala cryptography na ojiji ya n’ime nchekwa kọmputa.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji cryptographie e jamfaaji e nder sécurité informatique.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion des événements
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion des Événements

description.fr: Apprenez à planifier, organiser et gérer des événements professionnels, culturels et sociaux à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Learn to plan, organize, and manage professional, cultural, and social events on an international scale.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تخطيط وتنظيم وإدارة الفعاليات المهنية والثقافية والاجتماعية على المستوى الدولي.
description.sw: Jifunze kupanga, kuandaa na kusimamia matukio ya kitaaluma, kitamaduni na kijamii kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake tsara, shirya da gudanar da taruka na sana'a, al'adu da zamantakewa a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati gbero, ṣeto ati ṣakoso awọn iṣẹlẹ ọjọgbọn, aṣa ati awujọ ni kariaye.
description.am: በአለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የሙያ፣ የባህላዊ እና የማህበራዊ ክስተቶችን እንዴት እንደሚያደርጉ ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuhlela, ukuhlela nokuphatha imicimbi yobungcweti, yamasiko neyomphakathi emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi eme atụmatụ, hazie ma jikwaa mmemme ọrụ, omenala na mmekọrịta n'ụwa niile.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion événements e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la chaîne d’approvisionnement durable
title.en: Introduction to Sustainable Supply Chain Management
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة سلسلة التوريد المستدامة
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Mnyororo wa Ugavi Endelevu
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Silsilar Kayayyaki Mai Dorewa
title.yo: Ifihan si Isakoso pq Ipese Alagbero
title.ig: Mmalite na njikwa usoro nkwado na-adigide
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Chaîne d’Approvisionnement Durable

description.fr: Comprenez les enjeux et stratégies pour rendre la chaîne d’approvisionnement plus durable et responsable.
description.en: Understand the challenges and strategies to make supply chains more sustainable and responsible.
description.ar: تعرف على التحديات والاستراتيجيات لجعل سلسلة التوريد أكثر استدامة ومسؤولية.
description.sw: Elewa changamoto na mikakati ya kufanya mnyororo wa ugavi kuwa endelevu na kuwajibika zaidi.
description.ha: Fahimci kalubale da dabaru don sanya silsilar kayayyaki ta zama mai dorewa da alhaki.
description.yo: Ni oye lori awọn italaya ati awọn ilana lati jẹ ki pq ipese di alagbero ati lododo.
description.am: ችግኝነቶችን እና ዘዴዎችን ለማድረግ የተስተናጋጅ አቅርቦት ሰንሰለት ይማሩ።
description.zu: Qonda izinselele namasu okwenza izixhumanisi zokuhlinzekwa zibe ezisimeme nezinesibopho.
description.ig: Ghota nsogbu na atụmatụ iji mee ka usoro nkwado bụrụ nke na-adigide na na-ahụ maka mmadụ.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji chaîne approvisionnement durable e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la sécurité alimentaire
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usalama wa Chakula
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Tsaron Abinci

description.fr: Apprenez à analyser et gérer les risques liés à la sécurité alimentaire à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Learn to analyze and manage risks related to food security on a global scale.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تحليل وإدارة المخاطر المتعلقة بالأمن الغذائي على المستوى العالمي.
description.sw: Jifunze kuchambua na kusimamia hatari zinazohusiana na usalama wa chakula duniani.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake nazari da gudanar da hadurran da suka shafi tsaron abinci a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe itupalẹ ati iṣakoso ewu to ni ibatan si aabo ounje ni kariaye.
description.am: በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ ከምግብ ደህንነት ጋር የተያያዙ አደጋዎችን መተንተን እና መቆጣጠር ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuhlaziya nokuphatha izingozi ezihlobene nokuphepha kokudla emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi nyochaa ma jikwaa ihe ize ndụ metụtara nchekwa nri n’ụwa niile.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion sécurité alimentaire e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de l’innovation technologique
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Ubunifu wa Kiteknolojia
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Kirkirar Fasaha

description.fr: Découvrez les stratégies pour stimuler et gérer l’innovation technologique dans les organisations.
description.en: Discover strategies to foster and manage technological innovation in organizations.
description.ar: اكتشف الاستراتيجيات لتعزيز وإدارة الابتكار التكنولوجي في المنظمات.
description.sw: Gundua mikakati ya kukuza na kusimamia ubunifu wa kiteknolojia katika mashirika.
description.ha: Gano dabaru don karfafa da gudanar da kirkirar fasaha a kungiyoyi.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ilana lati mu ati ṣakoso imotuntun imọ-ẹrọ ninu awọn ajo.
description.am: በድርጅቶች ውስጥ የቴክኖሎጂ አዳዲስነትን ለማበረታታት እና ለማስተዳደር ዘዴዎችን ያስሩ።
description.zu: Thola amasu okukhuthaza nokuphatha ukusungulwa kwezobuchwepheshe ezinhlanganweni.
description.ig: Chọpụta atụmatụ iji kwalite ma jikwaa innovation technology n’ime ụlọ ọrụ.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion innovation technologique e jamfaaji e nder organisation aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la biodiversité
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Bambancin Halittu

description.fr: Comprenez l’importance de la biodiversité et les méthodes de sa gestion durable.
description.en: Understand the importance of biodiversity and methods for its sustainable management.
description.ar: تعرف على أهمية التنوع البيولوجي وطرق إدارته المستدامة.
description.sw: Elewa umuhimu wa bioanuwai na mbinu za usimamizi wake endelevu.
description.ha: Fahimci mahimmancin bambancin halittu da hanyoyin gudanar da shi mai dorewa.
description.yo: Ni oye lori pataki oniruuru eda ati awọn ọna isakoso alagbero rẹ.
description.am: የባዮዳይቨርሲቲ አስፈላጊነትን እና ለተስተናጋጅ አስተዳደር ዘዴዎችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Qonda ukubaluleka kwezinhlobonhlobo zezinhlobo zezinto eziphilayo nezindlela zokuphatha ezisimeme.
description.ig: Ghota mkpa biodiversity na ụzọ esi ejikwa ya n’ụzọ na-adigide.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion biodiversité e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la santé mentale
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Afya ya Akili
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Lafiyar Hankali
title.ig: Mmalite na njikwa ahu ike uche

description.fr: Apprenez à promouvoir et gérer la santé mentale dans différents contextes professionnels et sociaux.
description.en: Learn to promote and manage mental health in various professional and social contexts.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تعزيز وإدارة الصحة النفسية في سياقات مهنية واجتماعية مختلفة.
description.sw: Jifunze kukuza na kusimamia afya ya akili katika mazingira tofauti ya kitaaluma na kijamii.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake inganta da gudanar da lafiyar hankali a wurare daban-daban na aiki da zamantakewa.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe agbega ati iṣakoso ilera opolo ni awọn ipo ọjọgbọn ati awujọ oriṣiriṣi.
description.am: በተለያዩ የሙያ እና ማህበራዊ አውታረ ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ የአእምሮ ጤናን ማስተዳደር እና ማስተናገድ ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukukhuthaza nokuphatha impilo yengqondo ezimweni ezahlukene zobungcweti nezomphakathi.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi kwalite ma jikwaa ahu ike uche n’ime ọnọdụ ọrụ na mmekọrịta dị iche iche.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion santé mentale e jamfaaji e nder contexte professionnel e social.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la mobilité urbaine
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Uhamaji wa Mijini
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Harkokin Birni

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux et solutions pour une mobilité urbaine durable et inclusive.
description.en: Discover the challenges and solutions for sustainable and inclusive urban mobility.
description.ar: اكتشف التحديات والحلول للتنقل الحضري المستدام والشامل.
description.sw: Gundua changamoto na suluhisho za uhamaji wa mijini endelevu na jumuishi.
description.ha: Gano kalubale da mafita don samun harkokin birni mai dorewa da shigar da kowa.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn italaya ati awọn ojutu fun iṣipopada ilu alagbero ati ti gbogbo eniyan.
description.am: ለተስተናጋጅ እና ለሁሉም ተሳትፎ የሚያደርጉ የከተማ እንቅስቃሴ ችግኝነቶችን እና መፍትሄዎችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Thola izinselele nezixazululo zokuhamba kwamadolobha okuzinzile nokubandakanya wonke umuntu.
description.ig: Chọpụta nsogbu na ngwọta maka mmegharị obodo na-adigide na nke onye ọbụla nwere ike isonye.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji mobilité urbaine e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la transition énergétique
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Mpito wa Nishati
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Sauyin Makamashi

description.fr: Comprenez les enjeux de la transition énergétique et les stratégies pour un avenir durable.
description.en: Understand the challenges of energy transition and strategies for a sustainable future.
description.ar: تعرف على تحديات التحول الطاقي والاستراتيجيات لمستقبل مستدام.
description.sw: Elewa changamoto za mpito wa nishati na mikakati ya siku zijazo endelevu.
description.ha: Fahimci kalubale na dabaru don samun makoma mai dorewa a sauyin makamashi.
description.yo: Ni oye lori awọn italaya iyipada agbara ati awọn ilana fun ọjọ iwaju alagbero.
description.am: የኃይል ሽግግር ችግኝነቶችን እና ለተስተናጋጅ ወደፊት ዘዴዎችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Qonda izinselele zokushintsha kwamandla namasu wesikhathi esizayo esimeme.
description.ig: Ghota nsogbu na atụmatụ maka mgbanwe ike na ọdịnihu na-adigide.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji transition énergétique e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la qualité de l’air
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Ubora wa Hewa
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Ingancin Iska
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Qualité de l’Air

description.fr: Découvrez les méthodes et outils pour surveiller et améliorer la qualité de l’air.
description.en: Discover methods and tools to monitor and improve air quality.
description.ar: اكتشف الطرق والأدوات لمراقبة وتحسين جودة الهواء.
description.sw: Gundua mbinu na zana za kufuatilia na kuboresha ubora wa hewa.
description.ha: Gano hanyoyi da kayan aiki don sa ido da inganta ingancin iska.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ọna ati irinṣẹ lati ṣakoso ati mu didara afẹfẹ dara.
description.am: የአየር ጥራትን ለመቆጣጠር እና ለማሻሻል ዘዴዎችን እና መሳሪያዎችን ያስሩ።
description.zu: Thola izindlela namathuluzi okuqapha nokuthuthukisa ikhwalithi yomoya.
description.ig: Chọpụta ụzọ na ngwá ọrụ iji nyochaa ma melite ogo ikuku.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion qualité air e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la sécurité informatique
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة أمن تكنولوجيا المعلومات
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usalama wa TEHAMA
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Tsaron Bayanai

description.fr: Apprenez à protéger les systèmes d’information contre les menaces et attaques informatiques.
description.en: Learn to protect information systems against threats and cyberattacks.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية حماية أنظمة المعلومات من التهديدات والهجمات الإلكترونية.
description.sw: Jifunze kulinda mifumo ya habari dhidi ya vitisho na mashambulizi ya mtandaoni.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake kare tsarin bayanai daga barazana da hare-haren kwamfuta.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati daabobo awọn eto alaye lodi si ewu ati ikọlu ori ayelujara.
description.am: የመረጃ ስርዓቶችን ከአደጋዎች እና ከሳይበር ጥቃቶች ይጠብቁ።
description.zu: Funda ukuvikela amasistimu olwazi ezinsongweni nokuhlaselwa kwe-inthanethi.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi chebe usoro ozi megide ihe egwu na mwakpo kọmputa.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion sécurité informatique e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la communication interculturelle
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة الاتصال بين الثقافات
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Mawasiliano ya Tamaduni Tofauti
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Sadarwa Tsakanin Al'adu
title.ig: Mmalite na njikwa nkwurịta okwu n'etiti omenala

description.fr: Apprenez à gérer la communication entre personnes de cultures différentes dans un contexte international.
description.en: Learn to manage communication between people from different cultures in an international context.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية إدارة الاتصال بين أشخاص من ثقافات مختلفة في سياق دولي.
description.sw: Jifunze kusimamia mawasiliano kati ya watu wa tamaduni tofauti katika muktadha wa kimataifa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake gudanar da sadarwa tsakanin mutane daga al'adu daban-daban a duniya.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣakoso ibaraẹnisọrọ laarin awọn eniyan lati awọn aṣa oriṣiriṣi ni kariaye.
description.am: በአለም አቀፍ አውታረ ሁኔታ ውስጥ በባህላዊ ልዩነት መካከል ያለውን ኮሙኒኬሽን ያስተዳድሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuphatha ukuxhumana phakathi kwabantu abavela emasikweni ahlukene esimweni samazwe ngamazwe.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi jikwaa nkwurịta okwu n'etiti ndị si omenala dị iche iche n’ime ọnọdụ mba ụwa.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion communication interculturelle e jamfaaji e nder contexte international.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de l’eau
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion de l’Eau

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux et méthodes de gestion durable de l’eau à l’échelle mondiale.
description.en: Discover the challenges and methods of sustainable water management worldwide.
description.ar: اكتشف التحديات والأساليب لإدارة المياه المستدامة على مستوى العالم.
description.sw: Gundua changamoto na mbinu za usimamizi endelevu wa maji duniani.
description.ha: Gano kalubale da hanyoyin gudanar da ruwa mai dorewa a duniya.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn italaya ati awọn ọna isakoso omi alagbero ni kariaye.
description.am: በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የተስተናጋጅ ውሃ አስተዳደር ችግኝነቶችን እና ዘዴዎችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Thola izinselele nezindlela zokuphatha amanzi ezisimeme emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Ghota nsogbu na ụzọ esi ejikwa mmiri n’ụwa niile.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion eau e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion des conflits internationaux
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Migogoro ya Kimataifa
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Rikicin Duniya
title.ig: Mmalite na njikwa esemokwu mba ụwa
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion des Conflits Internationaux

description.fr: Apprenez à analyser, prévenir et gérer les conflits internationaux dans divers contextes.
description.en: Learn to analyze, prevent, and manage international conflicts in various contexts.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تحليل ومنع وإدارة النزاعات الدولية في سياقات مختلفة.
description.sw: Jifunze kuchambua, kuzuia na kusimamia migogoro ya kimataifa katika mazingira mbalimbali.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake nazari, hana da kuma gudanar da rikicin duniya a wurare daban-daban.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe itupalẹ, dena ati iṣakoso ija kariaye ni awọn ipo oriṣiriṣi.
description.am: በተለያዩ አውታረ ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ የአለም አቀፍ ግጭቶችን መተንተን፣ መከላከል እና መቆጣጠር ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuhlaziya, ukuvimbela nokuphatha izingxabano zamazwe ngamazwe ezimweni ezahlukene.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi nyochaa, gbochie ma jikwaa esemokwu mba ụwa n’ime ọnọdụ dị iche iche.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion conflits internationaux e jamfaaji e nder contexte aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la performance
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Gestion de la Performance

description.fr: Découvrez les outils et méthodes pour évaluer et améliorer la performance individuelle et collective.
description.en: Discover tools and methods to assess and improve individual and collective performance.
description.ar: اكتشف الأدوات والأساليب لتقييم وتحسين الأداء الفردي والجماعي.
description.sw: Gundua zana na mbinu za kutathmini na kuboresha utendaji wa mtu binafsi na wa pamoja.
description.ha: Gano kayan aiki da hanyoyin tantancewa da inganta ayyukan mutum da na rukuni.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn irinṣẹ ati awọn ọna lati ṣe ayẹwo ati mu iṣẹ ẹni kọọkan ati ẹgbẹ dara.
description.am: የግለሰቦች እና የቡድኖች አፈፃፀምን ለማስተካከል መሳሪያዎችን እና ዘዴዎችን ያስሩ።
description.zu: Thola amathuluzi nezindlela zokuhlola nokuthuthukisa ukusebenza komuntu ngamunye nokuqoqwayo.
description.ig: Chọpụta ngwá ọrụ na ụzọ esi nyochaa ma melite arụmọrụ mmadụ na otu.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion performance e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la sécurité environnementale
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usalama wa Mazingira
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Tsaron Muhalli

description.fr: Apprenez à identifier et gérer les risques environnementaux pour protéger la santé et la planète.
description.en: Learn to identify and manage environmental risks to protect health and the planet.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تحديد وإدارة المخاطر البيئية لحماية الصحة والكوكب.
description.sw: Jifunze kutambua na kusimamia hatari za mazingira ili kulinda afya na sayari.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake gano da gudanar da hadurran muhalli don kare lafiya da duniyar.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe idanimọ ati iṣakoso ewu ayika lati daabobo ilera ati aye.
description.am: የአካባቢ አደጋዎችን ለመለየት እና ለመቆጣጠር ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukubona nokuphatha izingozi zemvelo ukuvikela impilo nomhlaba.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi amata ma jikwaa ihe ize ndụ gburugburu ebe obibi iji chebe ahu ike na ụwa.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion sécurité environnementale e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la diversité générationnelle
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Utofauti wa Vizazi
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Bambancin Zuri'a
title.ig: Mmalite na njikwa iche iche ọgbọ

description.fr: Comprenez les enjeux et bonnes pratiques pour gérer la diversité des générations au travail.
description.en: Understand the challenges and best practices for managing generational diversity at work.
description.ar: تعرف على التحديات وأفضل الممارسات لإدارة التنوع الجيلي في العمل.
description.sw: Elewa changamoto na mbinu bora za kusimamia utofauti wa vizazi kazini.
description.ha: Fahimci kalubale da kyawawan hanyoyi don gudanar da bambancin zuri'a a wurin aiki.
description.yo: Ni oye lori awọn italaya ati awọn iṣe to dara julọ fun iṣakoso oniruuru iran ni ibi iṣẹ.
description.am: በስራ ቦታ ውስጥ የትውልድ ልዩነትን ለማስተዳደር ችግኝነቶችን እና ምርጥ ልምዶችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Qonda izinselele nemikhuba engcono yokuphatha ukuhlukahluka kwezizukulwane emsebenzini.
description.ig: Ghota nsogbu na omume kacha mma maka njikwa iche iche ọgbọ n’ọrụ.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion diversité générationnelle e jamfaaji e nder travail.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la mobilité internationale
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Uhamaji wa Kimataifa
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Harkokin Duniya
title.ig: Mmalite na njikwa mmegharị mba ụwa

description.fr: Découvrez les enjeux et solutions pour gérer la mobilité des personnes et des talents à l’international.
description.en: Discover the challenges and solutions for managing international mobility of people and talents.
description.ar: اكتشف التحديات والحلول لإدارة التنقل الدولي للأشخاص والمواهب.
description.sw: Gundua changamoto na suluhisho za kusimamia uhamaji wa kimataifa wa watu na vipaji.
description.ha: Gano kalubale da mafita don gudanar da harkokin duniya na mutane da basira.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn italaya ati awọn ojutu fun iṣipopada kariaye ti eniyan ati awọn talanti.
description.am: ለሰዎች እና ለችሎታዎች የአለም አቀፍ እንቅስቃሴን ለማስተዳደር ችግኝነቶችን እና መፍትሄዎችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Thola izinselele nezixazululo zokuphatha ukuhamba kwamazwe ngamazwe kwabantu namathalente.
description.ig: Chọpụta nsogbu na ngwọta maka njikwa mmegharị mba ụwa nke mmadụ na talent.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion mobilité internationale e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la propriété foncière
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Mali ya Ardhi
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Dukiyar Kasa

description.fr: Comprenez les principes et enjeux de la gestion de la propriété foncière à l’échelle internationale.
description.en: Understand the principles and challenges of land property management on an international scale.
description.ar: تعرف على مبادئ وتحديات إدارة الملكية العقارية على المستوى الدولي.
description.sw: Elewa misingi na changamoto za usimamizi wa mali ya ardhi kimataifa.
description.ha: Fahimci ka'idoji da kalubale na gudanar da dukiyar kasa a duniya.
description.yo: Ni oye lori ilana ati awọn italaya isakoso ohun-ini ile ni kariaye.
description.am: በአለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የመሬት ንብረት አስተዳደር መሠረቶችን እና ችግኝነቶችን ያስተምሩ።
description.zu: Qonda izimiso nezinkinga zokuphathwa kwezakhiwo zomhlaba emhlabeni wonke.
description.ig: Ghota ụkpụrụ na nsogbu njikwa ala n’ụwa niile.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion propriété foncière e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la sécurité routière
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة السلامة على الطرق
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Usalama Barabarani
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Tsaron Hanya

description.fr: Apprenez à analyser et améliorer la sécurité routière grâce à des stratégies et outils adaptés.
description.en: Learn to analyze and improve road safety through appropriate strategies and tools.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تحليل وتحسين السلامة على الطرق من خلال استراتيجيات وأدوات مناسبة.
description.sw: Jifunze kuchambua na kuboresha usalama barabarani kupitia mikakati na zana zinazofaa.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake nazari da inganta tsaron hanya ta hanyar dabaru da kayan aiki masu dacewa.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe itupalẹ ati mu aabo opopona dara pẹlu awọn ilana ati irinṣẹ to yẹ.
description.am: በተገቢ ዘዴዎች እና መሳሪያዎች የመንገድ ደህንነትን መተንተን እና ማሻሻል ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukuhlaziya nokuthuthukisa ukuphepha kwemigwaqo ngezindlela namathuluzi afanele.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi nyochaa ma melite nchekwa ụzọ site n’atụmatụ na ngwá ọrụ kwekọrọ.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion sécurité routière e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la qualité de l’eau
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Ubora wa Maji
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Ingancin Ruwa
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Qualité de l’Eau

description.fr: Découvrez les méthodes et outils pour surveiller et améliorer la qualité de l’eau.
description.en: Discover methods and tools to monitor and improve water quality.
description.ar: اكتشف الطرق والأدوات لمراقبة وتحسين جودة المياه.
description.sw: Gundua mbinu na zana za kufuatilia na kuboresha ubora wa maji.
description.ha: Gano hanyoyi da kayan aiki don sa ido da inganta ingancin ruwa.
description.yo: Ṣawari awọn ọna ati irinṣẹ lati ṣakoso ati mu didara omi dara.
description.am: የውሃ ጥራትን ለመቆጣጠር እና ለማሻሻል ዘዴዎችን እና መሳሪያዎችን ያስሩ።
description.zu: Thola izindlela namathuluzi okuqapha nokuthuthukisa ikhwalithi yamanzi.
description.ig: Chọpụta ụzọ na ngwá ọrụ iji nyochaa ma melite ogo mmiri.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion qualité eau e jamfaaji e nder aduna.

title.fr: Introduction à la gestion de la communication de crise
title.ar: مقدمة في إدارة الاتصال أثناء الأزمات
title.sw: Utangulizi wa Usimamizi wa Mawasiliano ya Dharura
title.ha: Gabatarwa ga Gudanar da Sadarwa Lokacin Rikici
title.yo: Ifihan si Isakoso Ibaraẹnisọrọ Lakoko Aawọ
title.ig: Mmalite na njikwa nkwurịta okwu oge nsogbu
title.ff: Jokkondiral e Ndaari Communication de Crise

description.fr: Apprenez à élaborer et mettre en œuvre des stratégies de communication efficaces en situation de crise.
description.en: Learn to develop and implement effective communication strategies in crisis situations.
description.ar: تعلم كيفية تطوير وتنفيذ استراتيجيات اتصال فعالة أثناء الأزمات.
description.sw: Jifunze kuunda na kutekeleza mikakati bora ya mawasiliano wakati wa dharura.
description.ha: Koyi yadda ake tsara da aiwatar da dabarun sadarwa masu inganci a lokacin rikici.
description.yo: Kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe agbekalẹ ati fi awọn ilana ibaraẹnisọrọ to munadoko si iṣẹ lakoko aawọ.
description.am: በአስቸኳይ ሁኔታዎች ውስጥ የተጠቃሚ የኮሙኒኬሽን ዘዴዎችን ማዘጋጀት እና ማስፈጸም ይማሩ።
description.zu: Funda ukudala nokusebenzisa amasu okuxhumana asebenzayo ezimweni zenkinga.
description.ig: Mụta otu esi emepe na rụọ atụmatụ nkwurịta okwu bara uru n’oge nsogbu.
description.ff: Ndeer e jamfaaji gestion communication crise e jamfaaji e nder aduna.
